briefs.translationSuggestion: KJV for rough-draft text; Fred may swap to ESV, NIV, or NLT in revision.
briefs.verseText: A sound heart is the life of the flesh: but envy the rottenness of the bones.
briefs.suggestedDirection: A seed connecting CPR, rhythm, heart, music, and the idea that the right inner rhythm helps preserve life.
hookPossibilities: CPR teaches that rhythm can help preserve life.
Some emotions do not stay in your head; they move into your body.
Envy can look spiritual or ambitious until it starts eating your peace.
practicalIllustrationPossibilities: phone battery draining in the background
a quiet heart changing the atmosphere of a room
briefs.rememberDirection: A quiet heart can heal what envy keeps inflaming.
briefs.prayerDirection: God, tune my heart toward life and peace.
briefs.challengeDirection: Name one envy trigger today. Bless that person, then release the comparison.
briefs.reviewStatus: NEEDS_FRED_REVIEW - KJV text and missing chapter 14 theme metadata.

briefs.translationSuggestion: KJV for rough-draft text; Fred may prefer NIV or ESV for final readability.
briefs.verseText: A soft answer turneth away wrath: but grievous words stir up anger.
briefs.suggestedDirection: A seed about small forms of goodness, love, and delight changing the atmosphere people carry into the world.
hookPossibilities: Some people know how to walk into a room and change the weather.
A soft answer is not weak; it is temperature control.
Not every fire needs more volume.
practicalIllustrationPossibilities: a text reply drafted twice before sending
briefs.rememberDirection: A soft answer is strength with the temperature turned down.
briefs.prayerDirection: God, make my words strong enough to be gentle.
briefs.challengeDirection: Before one tense reply today, pause and lower the temperature.
briefs.reviewStatus: NEEDS_FRED_REVIEW - KJV text and missing chapter 15 theme metadata.

briefs.translationSuggestion: KJV for rough-draft text; ESV or NIV may fit final spoken cadence.
briefs.verseText: A man's heart deviseth his way: but the LORD directeth his steps.
briefs.suggestedDirection: A seed about finding grace inside systems, technology, automation, or mechanical processes.
hookPossibilities: GPS has made us bold and helpless at the same time.
Planning is human; direction is holy.
Sometimes grace sounds like rerouting.
practicalIllustrationPossibilities: app development mistakes becoming a better rebuild
briefs.rememberDirection: Plan faithfully, but leave room for God to direct the steps.
briefs.prayerDirection: God, guide my steps beyond my best plans.
briefs.challengeDirection: Hold one plan open today and ask God to direct the next step.
briefs.reviewStatus: NEEDS_FRED_REVIEW - KJV text and missing chapter 16 theme metadata.

briefs.translationSuggestion: KJV for rough-draft text; NLT may make this verse especially speakable after Fred review.
briefs.verseText: Better is a dry morsel, and quietness therewith, than an house full of sacrifices with strife.
briefs.suggestedDirection: A seed about small forms of goodness, love, and delight changing the atmosphere people carry into the world.
hookPossibilities: A meal can be expensive and still taste like tension.
Peace is not a side dish; sometimes it is the whole meal.
You can have a full table and an empty atmosphere.
practicalIllustrationPossibilities: a good meal ruined by unresolved conflict
briefs.rememberDirection: Peace can make simple bread taste like blessing.
briefs.prayerDirection: God, make my presence part of the peace.
briefs.challengeDirection: Do one small thing today that makes your home easier to breathe in.
briefs.reviewStatus: NEEDS_FRED_REVIEW - KJV text and missing chapter 17 theme metadata.

briefs.translationSuggestion: KJV for rough-draft text; NIV or NLT may be stronger for final speech rhythm.
briefs.verseText: Death and life are in the power of the tongue: and they that love it shall eat the fruit thereof.
briefs.suggestedDirection: A seed about speech that seems cheap but carries real cost and consequence.
hookPossibilities: Words feel weightless until the bill arrives.
Speech is never as cheap as it feels in the moment.
Your mouth is planting fruit somebody will eventually eat.
briefs.rememberDirection: Words feel free until someone has to eat the fruit.
briefs.prayerDirection: God, put life in my mouth today.
briefs.challengeDirection: Speak one life-giving sentence today where criticism would be easier.
briefs.reviewStatus: NEEDS_FRED_REVIEW - KJV text and missing chapter 18 theme metadata.

briefs.translationSuggestion: KJV for rough-draft text; ESV or NIV may be best for final clarity.
briefs.verseText: There are many devices in a man's heart; nevertheless the counsel of the LORD, that shall stand.
briefs.suggestedDirection: A seed about learning through failed attempts until mistakes become the map toward the right take.
hookPossibilities: Creative people know how many takes it can take to find the take.
Your heart can hold a hundred plans, but only God's counsel can carry the weight.
Some plans are sketches; counsel is architecture.
practicalIllustrationPossibilities: a blueprint revised after seeing the foundation
briefs.rememberDirection: Your plans can change without God's counsel losing its footing.
briefs.prayerDirection: God, steady my plans inside Your counsel.
briefs.challengeDirection: Write one plan in pencil today and submit it to God's counsel.
briefs.reviewStatus: NEEDS_FRED_REVIEW - KJV text and missing chapter 19 theme metadata.

briefs.translationSuggestion: KJV for rough-draft text; NLT may be clearest for final spoken delivery.
briefs.verseText: Man's goings are of the LORD; how can a man then understand his own way?
briefs.suggestedDirection: A seed about hidden growth, unseen strength, and formation that happens away from public attention.
hookPossibilities: Some paths only make sense after you have walked them.
You can be guided before you understand.
Not every hidden thing is absent; some things are forming underground.
practicalIllustrationPossibilities: looking back at a confusing season
a parent guiding a child through a crowd
briefs.rememberDirection: You can be guided before you understand where you are going.
briefs.prayerDirection: God, guide me when understanding comes later.
briefs.challengeDirection: Take the next wise step today without demanding the full explanation.
